mergedObservations: 3 consecutive cycles: 0 organic traffic. All 7 PV from vercel.com referrer (internal/preview).
Product funnel works: 2/2 unique sessions completed quiz, 1 shared. Conversion is 100%.
SEO infra is solid: 363+ sitemap URLs live, JSON-LD (Org+WebSite+Quiz), robots.txt clean.
Recent features: tiered assessment, 8-language i18n, performance trim — all shipped to prod.
contradictions: CLAUDE.md says '363 pages discovered by Google' (Mar 27) but 9 days later still 0 organic visits. Likely discovered != indexed, or indexed but not ranking for any query.
confirmedHypotheses: PageViewTracker working correctly — captures referrer data, distinguishes internal from organic.

strategyReflection.currentStrategy: Build features → wait for organic traffic
strategyReflection.verdict: FAILING — features don't generate traffic. Distribution is bottleneck, not product quality.
strategyReflection.evidence: 3 major feature deploys (P2-P4) in last week, 0 organic visitors gained.
strategyReflection.selfEvolution: 3 consecutive SKIPs with unchanged metrics triggers strategy review per harness rules.

insights: The product converts visitors (100% quiz completion, 50% share). The problem is purely acquisition.
No external links point to gametan.ai. Without backlinks or social distribution, Google won't prioritize indexing.
Building more features is wasted effort until at least 1 acquisition channel works.
X automation is forbidden. Social posting requires human or alternative channels.

actions: 1. Verify Google indexing: site:gametan.ai search to check actual indexed page count
2. Human task: post social content from docs/social-posts.md to at least 1 platform
3. Human task: submit gametan.ai to Google Search Console if not already done
4. After checkpoint (Apr 8): if still 0 organic → pivot to paid or community-driven acquisition
nextFocus.doNotBuild: No new features until organic traffic > 0. Code changes only for SEO/distribution improvements.
